title: OrganiGram Holdings (OGI) Q2 2021 Earnings Call Transcript
text: OrganiGram Holdings Q2 2021 Earnings Call. Period ending March 31, 2021. The company reported Q2 was a transition period while they were ramping up operations and hiring requisite staff. The biggest challenge in Q2 was a combination of not enough supply or processing capacity to respond to market demand, and they left significant revenue on the table. The company essentially shut down the Moncton facility on two occasions in Q2, sending employees home to isolate due to COVID-19. Beyond Q3, the company was targeting first sales of soft chews in fiscal Q4 2021. The company was focused on operational improvements including reducing packaging costs and improving automation on their production lines. Earnings call held April 22, 2021.
